title: 5-Shaped Rainbow Foil Balloon (86cm) - Perfect for Celebrations, Party Decor, Birthday, And More - 1 Pc
features: BURSTING WITH COLOR: This 5-shaped rainbow foil balloon offers a stunning array of vibrant hues to brighten up any event. Your celebration will take on a whole new vivacity with its rainbow-colored design.
HIGH-QUALITY FOIL MATERIAL: Constructed from durable and sturdy foil, this 86cm (34-inch) balloon ensures long-lasting, reliable performance - perfect for indoor and outdoor celebrations.

VERSATILE PARTY ESSENTIAL: Ideal for a wide range of celebrations such as birthdays, anniversaries, graduations, or themed events; effortlessly elevate the festive atmosphere with this striking number 5 balloon.
EASY TO INFLATE: Quick and hassle-free inflation process eliminates the need for complicated setups; simply use air or helium to fill the balloon and bring your colorful celebration to life.

EXCEPTIONAL VALUE, ONE PIECE: This package includes 1 rainbow number 5 shaped foil balloon, providing you with a cost-effective solution to elevate your party décor game - make your celebration unforgettable.
description: From the manufacturer Giant Rainbow 34" Foil Number Balloons Make no mistake where the celebrations begin with these Rainbow Foil Number Balloons! These balloons are ideal to show off your birthday age, anniversary year or new year in eye catching fashion and fit any party with a rainbow motif or accent! Don't forget the balloon weights and ribbon!
